Label_AddByNameInstruction:
Enter process names without the .exe extension at the end
To add multiple processes, enter their names separated by /
Label_HotkeyInstruction: Press and release the desired key
Label_Work:
The program is running!
Press [KEY] to change volume.
Press [KEY] to stop the program.
Message_EmptyList: The focused programs list is empty!
Message_SimilarHotkeys: Work hotkey and exit hotkey must not be the same!
Message_MuteNotExist: The file mute.mp3 is missing in the program root folder
Message_UnmuteNotExist: The file unmute.mp3 is missing in the program root folder
Message_SoundWarning: The program will not play missing sounds.
Message_InstanceError: Only one instance of the program can be running.
Message_NoOneDeviceWasFoundWarning: No playback device was found. Continued use of the program in Volume mode may result in unhandled exceptions.
Tooltip_Blacklist:
In blacklist mode, the volume will only change for processes
that are in the focused programs list.
Tooltip_Whitelist:
In whitelist mode, the volume will change for all processes
except those in the focused programs list.
Tooltip_Mute: In volume control mode, the program changes the volume of processes from the list of focused programs in the Windows mixer.
Tooltip_Pause:
In pause mode, the program emulates pressing the Pause key on the keyboard,
which pauses the currently playing content. Not all programs interact
with it correctly, so otherwise use the volume mode.
Tooltip_Volume: The value to which the volume level of processes from the focused programs list will be changed.
Tooltip_WorkHotkey: The key that will activate the program according to the selected mode.
Tooltip_ExitHotkey: The key that will stop the program.
Tooltip_IndicationVolume:
The volume at which sounds will be played,
indicating activation or deactivation of volume change.
Tooltip_WorkAfterStart: After launching, the program will immediately switch to work mode.
